chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-1260 of 2012. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.2320/2020. 02. For orders on maintainability of M.A.No.2319/2020. 09.11.2021 Mr. Nisar Ahmed G.Abro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of listed application on merit, if the respondents are directed to consider the case of petitioner for his appointment in Education Department at Larkana, on merit. The appointment in public service is to be made on merit; therefore, no order for consideration of case of petitioner for his appointment in Education Department is called for. However, subject to his qualification, the petitioner may apply for his appointment on merit in Education Department, when the posts are advertised formally. The listed application is disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E
